<!-- summary / description 支持 HTML 和 GitHub Flavored Markdown -->

```json
{
  "slug": "",
  "title": { "zh": "", "en": "", "ja": "" },
  "summary": { "zh": "", "en": "", "ja": "" },
  "ootqTier": "low",
  "ootqLevel": { "zh": "", "en": "", "ja": "" },
  "origin": "MUGEN",
  "author": "",
  "activation": [],
  "techniques": [],
  "tags": { "zh": [], "en": [], "ja": [] },
  "image": "",
  "downloadUrl": "",
  "description": { "zh": "", "en": "", "ja": "" }
}
```
